test case id: tc-report-001 title: user creates a report with valid data module: report creation source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: "tree fallen on sidewalk" - image: (image file) - coordinates: (latitude, longitude) - urgency: high - category: tree maintenance - area: central park test steps: 1. user selects "create report" from the ui. 2. user enters report details including description, image, coordinates, urgency, category, and area. 3. ui uploads the image to firebasestorage. 4. ui sends the report data to firebasefirestore. 5. firebasefirestore searches for the nearest competent entity based on coordinates and urgency. 6. firebasefirestore returns the nearest entity data. 7. ui saves the report with the image url and entity data. 8. ui confirms the report saving. expected result: report is created successfully and assigned to a competent entity, with a confirmation message displayed to the user.

test case id: tc-report-001 title: user creates a report with valid data module: report creation source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: "tree fallen on sidewalk" - image: (image file) - coordinates: (latitude, longitude) - urgency: high - category: tree maintenance - area: central park test steps: 1. user selects "create report" from the ui. 2. user enters report details including description, image, coordinates, urgency, category, and area. 3. ui uploads the image to firebasestorage. 4. ui sends the report data to firebasefirestore. 5. firebasefirestore searches for the nearest competent entity based on coordinates and urgency. 6. firebasefirestore returns the nearest entity data. 7. ui saves the report with the image url and entity data. 8. ui confirms the report saving. expected result: report is created successfully and assigned to a competent entity, with a confirmation message displayed to the user.
